pattern: Counting maximal stretches where every neighbour flips value lets you add their triangular subarray counts, since a run of length L contributes L*(L+1)/2 alternating subarrays.
hints: A subarray is alternating exactly when each adjacent pair differs, so identify the maximal runs with that property.
Within one such run of length L every contiguous slice is also alternating.
A run of length L contributes L*(L+1)/2 subarrays; sum that over all runs.

edge_inputs.description: one repeat breaks an otherwise alternating start
all identical values give only single-element subarrays
multiple short runs separated by repeats

stress.note: produces a mix of run lengths

stress.description: biased toward repeats to create long equal runs
stress.note: stresses the run-length accumulation with many single-length runs
